title: Adoption of the Law on Hydrogen Transmission Networks: A Decisive Step Towards the Decarbonisation of the Luxembourg Economy
content: The Chamber of Deputies adopted Bill 8298 on the establishment of hydrogen transport networks. This text represents a decisive step in the implementation of the hydrogen strategy adopted on 8 July 2021, demonstrating Luxembourg's commitment to the energy transition and decarbonisation. This text aims to establish an initial legal framework for the planning, development and operation of hydrogen transport infrastructure in Luxembourg, while integrating interconnections with neighbouring countries.
author: Analysts Account
